summary: Full-year pacing calendar generated for Algebra I (ALG-01, ALG-02, ALG-03), 2026-27. 10 units mapped across 170 instructional days, September 9, 2026 through June 30, 2027. 10 buffer days placed at post-break transitions and flex/review points. All 10 assessment dates avoid Mondays. Calendar note: Units 9 and 10 overlap with the Regents prep window due to calendar math (179 available weekdays - 10 buffers = 169 net slots; 170th day is June 30). Late-June delivery should be framed as integrated Regents review. NY Next Gen standards alignment deferred pending teacher spec.
